scope_summary.problem: After TD specs are updated, agents write code from scratch (token-expensive, drift-prone). Goal: TD is the single source of truth, code mechanically derived. See user_input.md and issue enhancement-spec-diff-codegen-td-to-code-pipeline.
success_criteria: score gen diff shows 0% drift for all structural specs (Category A)
score gen diff shows <= 30% marker lines for behavioral specs (Category B)
score gen apply regenerates code without breaking cargo check + cargo test
CODEGEN-BEGIN/END markers survive re-generation (content inside updated, wrapper preserved)

in_scope: Per-diagram Content types for all Mermaid Plus section types
Abstract type system for Rust codegen (integer, string, list<T>)
CODEGEN-BEGIN/END marker parser and block replacer
Replace XState schemas with new Graph-based schemas
out_of_scope: Complete FSM runtime codegen (entry/exit actions, context, side effects)
constraints: Per-diagram Content types not universal Graph<N,E> (D3)
Abstract type system for future multi-language expansion (D6)
